title: Add mirror recurrence non-record submission
author: cschubiner

data.description: Reuses 9 unique transformer blocks across 18 logical layers with mirrored encoder/decoder recurrence (forward 0..8, reverse 8..0).
Shares transformer block weights across multiple logical layers to keep parameter count nearly unchanged.
Input and output embeddings are tied.
Serialization fix to exclude non-tensor schedule state from export so only tensor state is quantized and compressed.

novel_contributions: Mirrored recurrent depth: encoder uses blocks 0..8 and decoder reuses them in reverse order 8..0.
Reuses 9 unique transformer blocks across 18 logical layers to increase depth without increasing parameter count much.
Serialization fix that exports only tensor state and excludes Python schedule lists from the artifact.
Keeps the int8+zlib submission comfortably under the 16 MB cap.
